provided.title: Provided
provided.description: Strandedness declared in the samplesheet. "auto" means Salmon was asked to infer the strandedness.

salmon_inferred.title: Salmon inferred
salmon_inferred.description: Strandedness inferred by Salmon from a subsample of reads. Dash when Salmon inference did not run for this sample.

salmon_pct.title: Salmon %
salmon_pct.description: Certainty of the Salmon strand call: the inferred direction's share of the strand-classified fragment pool (the same quantity the configured stranded_threshold is applied to). Blank for unstranded or undetermined calls, where different thresholds apply.

salmon-salmon_s.title: Salmon Sense %
salmon-salmon_s.description: Salmon: percentage of fragments mapped in the forward (sense) orientation. Hidden by default; toggle via Configure Columns.

salmon-salmon_a.title: Salmon Antisense %
salmon-salmon_a.description: Salmon: percentage of fragments mapped in the reverse (antisense) orientation. Hidden by default; toggle via Configure Columns.

salmon-salmon_u.title: Salmon Unstranded %
salmon-salmon_u.description: Salmon: percentage of fragments that could not be assigned to either strand. Hidden by default; toggle via Configure Columns.

rseqc_inferred.title: RSeQC inferred
rseqc_inferred.description: Strandedness inferred by RSeQC / RustQC infer_experiment. Dash when infer_experiment did not run.

rseqc_pct.title: RSeQC %
rseqc_pct.description: Certainty of the RSeQC infer_experiment strand call: the inferred direction's share of the strand-classified fragment pool (the same quantity the configured stranded_threshold is applied to). Blank for unstranded or undetermined calls.

rseqc-rseqc_s.title: RSeQC Sense %
rseqc-rseqc_s.description: RSeQC: percentage of fragments mapped in the forward (sense) orientation. Hidden by default; toggle via Configure Columns.

rseqc-rseqc_a.title: RSeQC Antisense %
rseqc-rseqc_a.description: RSeQC: percentage of fragments mapped in the reverse (antisense) orientation. Hidden by default; toggle via Configure Columns.

rseqc-rseqc_u.title: RSeQC Unstranded %
rseqc-rseqc_u.description: RSeQC: percentage of fragments that could not be assigned to either strand. Hidden by default; toggle via Configure Columns.

status.title: Status
status.description: pass / fail whenever RSeQC infer_experiment is active - the call is compared against Salmon-inferred strandedness for 'auto' samples and against the samplesheet value otherwise. Dash when infer_experiment is not active, so no cross-check is possible.
